title: Get AZM Time Series by Date
description: This endpoint returns the daily summary values over a period of time by specifying a date and time period.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The end date of the period in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The range for which data will be returned. Supported: 1d | 7d | 30d | 1w | 1m | 3m | 6m | 1y

response_fields.name: value : activeZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: Total count of active zone minutes.

response_fields.name: value : fatBurnActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the fat burn heart rate zone. 1 fat burn minute = 1 fat burn active zone minute.

response_fields.name: value : cardioActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the cardio heart rate zone. 1 cardio minute = 2 cardio active zone minutes.

response_fields.name: value : peakActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the peak heart rate zone. 1 peak minute = 2 peak active zone minutes.
